title: Object-Oriented Architecture and Capstone Delivery · Scenario Checkpoint
summary: Deliver an extensible community-resource workflow with a domain core, replaceable boundaries, migrations, and operator evidence. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a production-shaped object-oriented capstone. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate domain rules, application orchestration, infrastructure adapters, and user interface concerns with explicit dependencies.
Use domain services only for cohesive rules that do not naturally belong to one entity or value object.
Version persisted representations and migrate data without coupling domain objects directly to historical storage schemas.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
